case_title: PRIVITERA, CHARLES, JR. VS JAVELIN FINE JEWELRY AND GIFTS ("OWNER JACOB")

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,165.00 FILED BY PRIVITERA, CHARLES, JR. AS TO DEFENDANT JAVELIN FINE JEWELRY AND GIFTS ("OWNER JACOB") ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JAVELIN FINE JEWELRY AND GIFTS ("OWNER JACOB")

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRIVITERA, CHARLES, JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAVELIN FINE JEWELRY AND GIFTS ("OWNER JACOB") $40.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $62.00, THIS JUDGMENT REPRESENTS A NET RECOVERY; THE COURT FINDS THE VALUE OF THE CHAIN AND CROSS TO HAVE BEEN $125; PLAINTIFF RECEIVED $85 AS PART OF THE ORIGINAL LOAN AND ALEDGE TRANSACTION; PLAINTIFF'S NET RECOVERY IS $40. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JAVELIN FINE JEWELRY AND GIFTS ("OWNER JACOB")
